summary: Completed testing of Site Map Unlink Feature and Top Bar removal. All backend tests pass (11/11). Frontend features verified: unlinked badge visible, view toggle visible, refresh button visible, hover tooltip with X remove button works, + dropdown shows only 'Main Nav' and 'Footer' (no Top Bar), Board View shows 3 columns (Main Navigation, Footer Links, Homepage - no Top Bar), Bulk action bar shows 3 buttons (no Top Bar).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site Map Unlink Feature fully tested. Key changes verified: 1) linked_from now returns objects with {label, type, menu_type, item_id, removable} instead of strings. 2) POST /api/website-admin/sitemap/unlink endpoint works for nav (requires menu_type, item_id), footer (requires section, link_url), and homepage (requires category_id). 3) Top Bar has been completely removed from UI - not in + dropdown, not in Board View columns, not in bulk action bar. 4) Hover tooltip shows X remove button for unlinking pages.

backend: GET /api/website-admin/sitemap - linked_from returns objects with type, removable, IDs (not strings)
Nav links have menu_type and item_id for unlinking
Footer links have section and link_url for unlinking
Homepage links have category_id for unlinking
POST /api/website-admin/sitemap/unlink type=nav - requires menu_type and item_id
POST /api/website-admin/sitemap/unlink type=footer - requires section and link_url
Full unlink flow: add nav item, verify in sitemap, unlink, verify removed
frontend: Unlinked badge (484 unlinked) visible in header, not hidden behind sidebar
Hover tooltip shows 'LINKED FROM' with source details
Hover tooltip has X remove button for unlinking
+ dropdown on non-category pages shows only 'Main Nav' and 'Footer' (no Top Bar)
Board View shows 3 destination columns: Main Navigation, Footer Links, Homepage (no Top Bar)
Bulk action bar shows 3 buttons: Main Navigation, Footer Links, Homepage (no Top Bar)
All header controls visible and not hidden behind right sidebar
